arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Villarreal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona host Villarreal this evening with the club’s title celebrations in full swing. The Catalans clinched the La Liga title in midweek and are set to be presented with the trophy tonight. Lamine Yamal’s wonder goal set the club on route to a 2-0 win over local rivals Espanyol, before Fermin Lopez sealed the points […] The post Barcelona vs Villarreal – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
